output:
Done. The root cause: `~/.cache/codebase-memory-mcp/` doesn't exist on this machine, so the hook always falls back to `[G2-GREP]` (plain file paths) instead of `[G2-PREFETCH]` (Function/Class symbols). The dashboard only extracted `[G2-PREFETCH]`, so "Code files" always showed "nothing surfaced".

Two fixes applied (both editable-install live):
- **`ctx_report.py:237-260`** — `_extract_block` now handles Format 3 (plain file paths for `[G2-GREP]`), and filters `Start with:` summary lines before the Format 3 check
- **`server.py:461-463`** — `_compute_samples` falls back to `[G2-GREP]` extraction when `[G2-PREFETCH]` is empty

The dashboard "Code files" block will now show file paths from git-grep results when no codebase-memory DB is indexed.
